categories.label: Game servers
categories.description: Who may play on hosted servers, and who may host their own.

permissions.label: Play on servers
permissions.description: Link a game account, reach the servers others added you to, and download the client files.

permissions.label: Host own servers
permissions.description: Create and run game servers. Each server commits memory, a port and a public domain.

permissions.label: Administer all servers
permissions.description: See and control every server on the host, not only your own.
